'''Light Brigade Division''' was a [[Brigade/Legends|brigade]] of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Corps/Legends|corps]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the last year of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The brigade included [[HOB-147]], who flew a [[V-19 Torrent starfighter/Legends|V-19 Torrent starfighter]].

Shortly before the execution of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], Light Brigade engaged [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] forces in a space battle. During the battle [[HOB-147]]'s starfighter was badly damaged.

{{Rep-stub}}
